articles.title: U.S. sinks Iranian warship as Iran warns of widespread destruction in the Middle East
articles.description:
In addition to striking Tehran on the fifth day of the conflict, Israel hit the Iranian-backed Hezbollah militant group in Lebanon, while Iran fired on Bahrain, Kuwait and Israel.

The post U.S. sinks Iranian warship as Iran warns of widespread destruction in the Middle East appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: U.S. Navy sunk an Iranian warship amid escalating Middle East tensions.
Israel targeted Hezbollah in Lebanon, intensifying regional conflict on March 4, 2026.
Boston residents may face increased security measures due to heightened Middle East instability.

articles.title: A rat race to the rescue: MSPCA-Angell seeks homes after 163 rodents surrendered
articles.description:
Dozens of whiskered companions are up for adoption after one of the largest rat surrenders MSPCA-Angell has seen in years.

The post A rat race to the rescue: MSPCA-Angell seeks homes after 163 rodents surrendered appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MSPCA-Angell received 163 rats surrendered, marking a significant rescue effort.
Adoption event aims to find homes for these rodents in the Boston area.
Local residents encouraged to adopt, helping alleviate animal overcrowding at the shelter.

articles.title: Takeaways from the first elections of the 2026 midterm campaigns
articles.description:
For all the focus on Texas, elections in North Carolina could have a bigger impact on which party ultimately wins the Senate majority in the fall.

The post Takeaways from the first elections of the 2026 midterm campaigns appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: North Carolina elections may influence Senate majority in 2026 midterms.
Texas remains a focus, but North Carolina's outcomes could be more significant.
Boston residents should monitor these elections for potential national policy shifts.

articles.title: ‘Nobody wants to see this’: Knicks fan Rich Eisen’s rant about the Celtics
articles.description:
"Right now, as we're sitting here, it's entirely possible — you can't say otherwise — that the Boston Celtics are really freaking good, and are coming out of nowhere."

The post ‘Nobody wants to see this’: Knicks fan Rich Eisen’s rant about the Celtics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rich Eisen acknowledges the Boston Celtics' unexpected strength this season.
Eisen's comments reflect growing concern among rival fans about the Celtics' performance.
Celtics' success may boost local morale and increase game attendance in Boston.

articles.title: Boston 25 News reporter Drew Karedes leaves after nine years
articles.description:
The North Shore native announced his departure on social media Tuesday.

The post Boston 25 News reporter Drew Karedes leaves after nine years appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Drew Karedes announced his departure from Boston 25 News on March 4, 2026.
Karedes served as a reporter for nine years, impacting local news coverage.
His exit may affect local viewers' access to familiar reporting on North Shore issues.

articles.title: 12 vehicles involved in series of crashes on I-95 ramp in Danvers
articles.description:
All involved were transported to local hospitals after icy roadways caused the chain-reaction crashes, state police say.

The post 12 vehicles involved in series of crashes on I-95 ramp in Danvers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Twelve vehicles were involved in crashes on the I-95 ramp in Danvers due to icy conditions.
All individuals involved were transported to local hospitals for treatment after the accidents.
The series of crashes highlights ongoing winter weather hazards affecting Boston area commuters.

articles.title: 2 people, including child, hit by car in Dorchester
articles.description:
An adult and a juvenile suffered minor injuries Tuesday night, police say.

The post 2 people, including child, hit by car in Dorchester appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two individuals, an adult and a child, were hit by a car in Dorchester.
The incident occurred on Tuesday night, resulting in minor injuries.
Local residents are urged to be cautious while driving in the area.

articles.title: Auburn police seek missing Mass. woman last seen in Florida
articles.description:
Authorities say 47-year-old Jennifer Remillard was last seen Jan. 31 in Sarasota and may be traveling cross-country.

The post Auburn police seek missing Mass. woman last seen in Florida appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Auburn police are searching for 47-year-old Jennifer Remillard, missing since January 31.
Remillard was last seen in Sarasota, Florida, and may be traveling cross-country.
Local residents are urged to report any sightings to assist in her safe return.
